directions.intent: Set the tone; test whether she'll bolt.
directions.subtext: I'm warning you, but part of me is glad you did.

directions.intent: Hold him to his promise; demand he deliver.
directions.subtext: Don't play games with me — I came for a reason.

directions.intent: Correct her gently and reset the power dynamic.
directions.subtext: You misheard what you wanted to hear. I'm here to dig.

directions.intent: Brace herself and surrender to the questioning.
directions.subtext: Fine. Get it over with before I lose my nerve.

directions.intent: Pin her down with the one question that matters.
directions.subtext: This is the question I've carried for six years.
directions.text: Where were you the night your sister disappeared?

directions.intent: Offer warmth, oblivious to the storm at the table.
directions.subtext: Don't mind me, just doing my rounds.

directions.intent: Dismiss the interruption without breaking eye on Maya.
directions.subtext: Move along — this isn't the night for kindness.

directions.intent: Confess the geography before she loses her courage.
directions.subtext: There. The thing I've never said out loud.

directions.intent: Tighten the noose with a single syllable.
Plead to be believed without raising her voice.
directions.subtext: I found nothing — and I've been carrying that ever since.
directions.text: She was already gone when I got there.

directions.intent: Drive the blade in — force the real answer.
directions.subtext: Whatever you say next decides everything.
directions.text: Then why'd you wait six years to say so?
